allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---PYTHON---"; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(python -m pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet --disable-pip-version-check 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; Write-Output "EXITCODE=$LASTEXITCODE")
